items.text:
WROCŁAW // NA RATUNEK 112
PILNE

Do serialu "Na Ratunek 112" nadal poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

13.03 (PIĄTEK) - 14.03 (SOBOTA)

PATRYK Słowiński (25-31 lat) - Syn bogatych właścicieli sieci aptek. Na pozór kulturalny i zakochany w Ewelinie, w rzeczywistości bardziej dba o interesy rodzinne i spadek. Gdy dowiaduje się o chorobie Eweliny, zrywa zaręczyny. Ukrywa, że zdradził ją z prostytutką i zaraził się wirusem zapalenia wątroby typu B, narażając również ją na zakażenie.

13.03 (PIĄTEK) - 14.03 (SOBOTA)

SŁAWEK Rawicz (21-27 lat) - Student, dorabiający jako taksówkarz. Pracowity, szczery, otwarty, empatyczny. Zakochuje się w Ewelinie i akceptuje jej chorobę, wspiera ją w leczeniu.

14.03 (SOBOTA) - Z OKOLIC WROCŁAWIA (zdjęcia w sobotę rano)

KRZYSZTOF Słowiński (50-59 lat) - Ojciec Patryka, współwłaściciel sieci aptek. Surowy biznesmen, dla którego najważniejsza jest firma i jej przyszłość. Negatywnie reaguje na wieść o chorobie Eweliny.

14.03 (SOBOTA) - Z OKOLIC WROCŁAWIA (zdjęcia w sobotę rano)

WANDA Słowińska (47-56 lat) - Matka Patryka, współwłaścicielka sieci aptek. Elegancka, wyniosła kobieta, która początkowo akceptuje Ewelinę, ale po diagnozie nie chce jej za synową.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla roli PATRYKA zapewniamy również nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o treści:

"Zgłoszenie do 112, odc. 1164 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

Nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Messengerze.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

topComments.text: wysłane kilka dni temu :)

items.text:
# **🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED FOR SPIDER-MAN FAN FILM NON-PAYED 

We are currently casting a small group of background extras for an emotional street scene in our upcoming Spider-Man fan film, “Becoming Our Spider-Man.”

SCENE DESCRIPTION:  
This scene takes place after Spider-Man fails to save one of his allies and is left injured and emotionally broken while the Hobgoblin threatens to finish him. A group of everyday New Yorkers step forward to defend Spider-Man, standing between him and the villain. Inspired by the powerful “You wanna get to him, you gotta go through me” moment, the people of the city remind Spider-Man that it wasn’t his fault, that he tried his best, and that even heroes can’t save everyone. The crowd encourages him to get back up and stop the Goblin.

WHO WE NEED:
• Around 10 background extras  
• All genders, ages 18+  
• Any ethnicity  
• Comfortable performing crowd reactions and possibly a few short supportive lines

PAY / COMPENSATION:
• Volunteer / unpaid background role  
• Food and drinks will be provided on set  
• Great opportunity for actors who want experience in a dramatic superhero scene

LOCATION:
London area (exact filming location will be provided after casting)

TO APPLY:
Please send the following:
• Name  
• Age  
• A recent photo/headshot  
• Any acting experience 

Email submissions to: ppeterb954@gmail.com

Subject line: “Spider-Man Extras Casting”

Be part of the crowd that reminds Spider-Man why the city still believes in him.

ISO: PAID **SFX Makeup Artist Needed – Short Film Production (Atlanta, GA)**

**Project Type:** Narrative/Period themed Short Film
**Filming Dates:** March 21–23, 2026
**Location:** Atlanta, Georgia

**Responsibilities:**
* Provide on-set makeup for **6 actors** (4 African American actors and 2 White American actors)
* Design and apply **bruise and facial injury effects** for ONE principal character (final shoot day)

**Requirements:**
* Experience with **SFX makeup**, particularly bruising and injury effects
* Experience working with **diverse skin tones**
* Ability to work efficiently on set and handle quick touch-ups between takes
* Must provide your **own makeup kit **

**Submission Instructions:**
Please send the following for consideration:
* Your **day rate**
* **Kit fee**
* **Portfolio / examples of previous work**
* Resume or brief description of experience

Submit all materials to:
**[hinoscemedia@gmail.com](mailto:hinoscemedia@gmail.com)**

Submissions will close March 17th, 2026

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, pushy, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 4th April. 

Sophia (23-35) Strong and confident, normal to higher-weight, sassy, eloquent, bold, had a recent breakup, and impulsive. Any ethnicity. She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 4th and 5th April. 

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. Asian. Started a new job as an accountant and overworked. Shoot on 5th April. 

Jessica (22-35) Beautiful, party girl, kind, good listener, has high morals, and is fashionable. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 5th April. 

Christine (23-35) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 5th April. 

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 5th April. 

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 3rd or 5th April. 

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 3rd or 5th April. 

Vijay's date- 33-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 5th April. 

Gym Girl- 22-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 4th April. 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 5th April. 

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Surrey/Langely

**Date:** 3rd to 5th April

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet,

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY DZIECIĘCE**

 

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **CHŁOPCÓW 8-10 LAT z doświadczeniem** **epizodycznym** na planach zdjęciowych.

Chłopcy muszą płynnie mówić po polsku, bez akcentu.

Chętnie zobaczymy tu bliźniaków.

 

Stawki ustalane indywidualnie. Wybory należą do reżysera.

 

***Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć aktualną wizytówkę dziecka jako link do You Tube***

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek dziecka, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'POD TYTUŁEM agencja castingowa CASTING DZIECIĘCY WARSZAWA NOWY SERIAL FABULARNY (WIOSNA 2026) POSZUKUJEMY CHŁOPCÓW 8-10 LAT 8-10 WIĘK 8-10 LAT DOSWIADCZENIE EPIZODYCZNE PŁYNNY JĘZYK POLSKI (BEZ CΈΤ) MILE WIDZIANI BLIZNIACY INSTRUKCJA ZGŁOSZENIA: WYŚLIJ NA WYŚLIJNAADRES: ADRES: ewelina.wika@ podtytulem.pl TYTUŁ: w TREŚCI: CHŁOPIEC Dane (imię/nazwisko (imie dziecka &rodzica, wiek, miejscowość, wzrost) ZAŁĄCZ: ZDJĘCIA TWARZY SYLWETKIORAZ IORAZ LINK DO WIZYTOWKI OWKI YOUTUBE szczegóły dotyczące zgłoszenia w treści postu'

items.text:
Looking for black child actress for short Film
I’m working on a 70s inspired psychological thriller short film about a birthday party gone wrong. The film follows a family of 6 living in a dysfunctional household.

I’m looking for a black child actress to play Zunah, the eldest daughter. Playing age: 10

Shooting dates: TBC (4 days)

If you’re a parent or guardian, email info@alessiamavakala.com with a headshot of your child and general availability to express interest.

My website is alessiamavakala.com if you want to check my previous work

topComments.text: No mention of pay or basic expenses?

items.text:
Witam,

Nazywam się Roman Buzov, mam 20 lat. Pochodzę z Ukrainy, 4 lata mieszkam w Polsce (aktualnie Poznań), mogę dojechać w dowolne miejsce.

Mam doświadczenie na planie – występowałem w serialu „Gliniarze” oraz jako statysta w kilku produkcjach (piłkarz, kibic, klient restauracji, imprezowicz, widz teatralny).

Od 5 lat aktywnie uprawiam sport (siłownia, kalistenika, wcześniej boks, pływanie, piłka nożna i walki filipińskie). Jestem osobą sprawną fizycznie i lubię wyzwania.

Mogę grać role epizodyczne z tekstem lub bez. Naturalne dla mnie typy ról: bandyta, biznesmen, trener, mafia. Zmiana fryzury lub zarostu nie stanowi problemu.

Mówię w językach: polski, angielski, rosyjski, ukraiński.
Posiadam samochód.

Parametry:
171 cm wzrostu, 70 kg
klatka 105 cm / pas 85 cm
rozmiar ubrań S/M
buty 40–41

W mediach społecznościowych publikuję treści o rozwoju i motywacji – łącznie ok. 1.5 mln wyświetleń.

W załączniku przesyłam aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki.

Z poważaniem,
Roman Buzov

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANY AKTOR DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI
Do filmu fabularnego poruszającego temat przemocy psychicznej poszukuję aktora  do głównej roli męskiej.

Szukam osoby, która wygląda młodo (na około 15-18 lat), ale posiada już doświadczenie aktorskie – mile widziani szczególnie studenci lub absolwenci szkół filmowych i teatralnych.

🎬 Projekt: film fabularny

📍 Miejsce nagrań: okolice Tarnowa i Krakowa

📅 Termin: do ustalenia (kilka dni zdjęciowych)

💰 Stawka: do uzgodnienia

Zależy mi na osobie naturalnej przed kamerą, potrafiącej zagrać emocjonalnie wymagającą rolę.

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać wraz z:

– krótkim opisem doświadczenia aktorskiego

– zdjęciem

– ewentualnie showreel lub fragmentem nagrania

Email Adamzdeb640@gmail.com

topComments.text: chetny

message.text: Ein Rosenkrieg bezeichnet eine extrem heftige, von Hass und Zerstörungswillen geprägte Scheidungs- oder Trennungsschlacht, bei der Ex-Partner versuchen, sich gegenseitig maximal zu schaden. Der Begriff leitet sich von den englischen Thronfolgekämpfen (1455–1485) zwischen den Häusern York und Lancaster ab, die Wappenrosen, so Google 🌹💥

CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT FILM
2 lead roles available and extras wanted!!

Unpaid roles!

Manchester based. 

Contact elporter222@gmail.com if you’re interested!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of skateboard and text that says 'CASTING CALL LEO Playing age: 16-19 (Over 18s only) Skater/2000s 2000s fashion sense. Upper class but portrays himself as lower class. Outgoing, confident and sociable. Thrives on connection and enjoys making others feel included. FREE SKATEBOARD INCLUDED'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL CLEM ...... Playing age: 14-18 (Over 18s only) Streetwear/2000s fashion sense. Middle class: Upper class accent, well spoken. Observant and introspective, navigating early independence with curiosity. Carries a subtle E. intensity that draws people in. @Measuresshort'

May be a doodle of text that says 'SUNOPSIS Set over a single afternoon in a skatepark, the film follows 16yr old Clem as she reconnects with old friend Leo, who offers to teach her how to skate. He refills her cup between attempts, starting as a sinister favour. As Clem continues, intoxi intoxication begins to compromise her balance and judgement, increasing the risk of each attempt. Leo's encouragement shifts into control as he recognises her growing instability. In the exposed park, Clem's deterioration becomes visible to others, raising questions of responsibility and transforming what began as a carefree reunion into a situation marked by vulnerability. @Measuresshort'

May be an image of text that says 'cous YOU OUBeTHE Next NYJAH HUSTON? APPLY TO BE BEA A BACKGROUND SKATER IN OUR 2000S INSPIRED SHORT FILM! MUST BE ABLE TO OLLIE OVER 18s ONLY ALL GENDERS WANTED SEND US YOUR BEST SKATE CLIPS! AROUND LATE MARCH TO EARLY APRIL @Measuresshort'

items.text:
We’re looking for 2 brilliant actors to join us on our short film, ‘FOREVER HOME’.

Logline: A man tries to abandon his dog at an animal shelter, only to find that there are some situations you can’t walk away from.

These are sadly **unpaid **roles (everyone is working in a volunteer capacity), but we will feed you! We are shooting on Saturday 11 April, only 1 day, so hopefully we are not asking too much of everyone's time. Location: London. Please see photos for more details.

Please send your Spotlight link / acting CV + headshots to wendywong.film@gmail.com

Deadline: Friday 13th March.

We look forward to hearing from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SHORT SHORTFILM FILM 'FOREVER 'FOREVERHOME' HOME' CASTING CALL Details SUBMIT YOUR SPOTLIGHT LINK TO WENDYWONG.FILM@GMAIL.COM BEFOR FRIDAY 13TH MARCH'

May be an image of text that says 'PROJECT: PROJECT:FOREVER FOREVER HOME LOGLINE: A MAN TRIES TO ABANDON HIS DOG AT AN ANIMAL SHELTER, ONLY TO FIND THAT THERE ARE SOME SITUATIONS YOU CAN'T WALK AWAY FROM. CHARACTER MAN 40s. Posh. I shoot pheasants for fun' chic. Has a luxurious lifestyle and cares about ac. He looks down on almost everyone. Pets are accessories to him and his wife.'

May be an image of text that says 'PROJECT: FOREVER HOME LOGLINE: A MAN TRIES tO ABANDON HIS DOG AT AN ANIMAL SHELTER, ONLY To FIND THAT THERE ARE SOME SITUATIONS YOU CAN'T WALK AWAY FROM. CHARACTER 2 VOLUNTEER 50s-60s. Animal lover. Sweet and kind, but can be vicious if needed. She /olunteers at an animal shelter and witnesses many animals being abandoned for ridiculous reasons, but she has her own way of tackling the problem...'

May be an image of text that says 'HOW HOWTOAPPLY TO APPLY Location: London submnit: Spotlight link/ acting CV & headshot Deadline: Friday 13th March Senor to: wendywong.film@gmail.com Notes: Must be confortable working with animals. Must not have allergies to dogs. FOREVER HOME DIRECTED WENDY YEE MAN WONG WRITTENBYJONNYKI KING BYJONN PRODUCED LARAKOZAH LARA ΚΟΖΑΗ A SLACKLINE PRODUCTION'

items.text:
🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

Fitting: Mar. 12th Filming: Mar. 13th and/or Mar. 28th COMPENSATION $1000+ 20% PER DAY FILMING $3000 +20% USAGE BUYOUT DEADLINE: FRIDAY, MARCH 6TH 6 PM PST'

items.text:
CASTING CALL! New LIFE OF CHRIST show with The Lantern Marquee, Performing May 25-30! Auditions (video submission) due Thurs 3/12, callbacks 3/14.
Why you want to be part of it:

🪨Performing as a themed dinner theatre at Provo's historic castle amphitheater, covered in lanterns!

🪨Music ONLY, no dialogue! Rehearsal schedule workable around your life. (required on-site dates: May 18-22; 25-30, evenings)

🪨Beautiful covers of 80's songs that have been carefully curated according to their spiritual analogues. (eg. "Who Wants to Live Forever," (cover by Il Volo) originally sung by Queen, is sung by Christ and the Disciples in our show. It’s amazing check it out:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwKUxTMSs6M)

DM with questions!

Learn more and audition using this link:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IhT-JZE7AEzRCOAyqVS8P0PN6daj9G_z?usp=sharing

**CASTING / REKLAMA / WARSZAWA**

Do reklamy serwisu internetowego szukamy aktorów i epizodystów:
* **Kobieta i mężczyzna **- ok. 18-40 lat.
* **Mężczyzna - **ok. 30-40 lat; min. 180 cm wzrostu.
* **Wysportowana blondynka **- ok. 30-40 lat.
* **Starszy pan z wąsem **- ok. 60-70 lat.

*Casting online lub stacjonarnie w Warszawie.

**Kiedy, gdzie, co:**

Warszawa, terminy w drugiej połowie marca, stawki w zależności od ról i zakresu praw: 4000 - 9000 zł.

**Zgłoszenia **proszę wysyłać na adres: **zgloszenia@eliteface.pl**, w treści podając: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy, **doświadczenie **oraz aktualne zdjęcia.

However, something went wrong. The virus mutated. Instead....

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CALLING EASTERN EUROPEAN ARTISTS

We are putting together a curated performance evening featuring Eastern European artists based in the UK.

We’re looking for performers who would like to share a short piece inspired by real stories and themes of identity, culture, family, and living between places.

Monologue • Poetry • Music • Movement

If this resonates with you and you’d like to take part, send us a message.

Must be available on the 12th of April - performance date, plus rehearsals prior to that 

Venue: OSO Arts Centre 

Please, contact me for more details: maria.stana10@gmail.com 

📍 London
🎭 Limited number of performers

items.text:
🔥** AUDITION CALL – PROFESSIONAL HEELS / HIP-HOP TEAM **🔥

**PAID WORK.   Spots are limited. Serious dancers only.**

**We are looking for 3 strong, versatile female dancers to join a professional Heels/Hip-Hop performance team for a short season. This is your opportunity to train and perform.**

✨** We’re Looking For:**

**• Women 18+,  Minimum height 5’6” (without heels)**

**• Strong foundation in Heels and/or Hip-Hop**

**• Performance quality and stage presence**

**• Confidence, musicality, and work ethic**

**• Commitment to rehearsals and bookings. The show routine you will learn to perform will be approximately three minute. **

💃** What You’ll Be Part Of:**

**• Professional performances & showcases**

**• High-quality concept videos**

**• Brand collaborations & paid opportunities**

**• Intensive training & choreography development**

**• A powerful, supportive team culture**

💰** Paid training & 6 performances. **

💐**show dates (performers must be able to do at least three or more of these dates (showtimes will be in the evening approximately 10 pm):**

20 April  Mon. Wimbledon 

25 April  Sat. Putney

29 April  Wed. Hammersmith  

1 May Fri - Fulham

5 May Tues - Fulham 

7  May Thur Earls Court

📍** Audition Details:**

**Date:   14th March 2026**

**Time:   4-6pm**

**Location: Dance Attic Studios, Fulham. **

**Dress Code: Form-fitting dancewear + heels**

**Bring: Heels,  Knee pads & water**

🎥** To Apply - register for free through website. **

**Deadline:   13th March (11:59pm)**

[https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/](https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/)

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Werde auch DU Teil von Backstage Event Management – Gemeinsam wachsen. Gemeinsam erfolgreich sein.

Du bist Künstlerin oder Künstler mit Vision, Talent und dem Wunsch nach mehr?
Dann ist jetzt der richtige Moment, den nächsten Schritt zu gehen.

Backstage Event Management steht für professionelle Betreuung, starke Netzwerke und echte Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Ich begleite dich nicht nur – ich baue mit dir deine Marke auf, strategisch, nachhaltig und individuell.

🎤 Künstlervermittlung & Booking
📈 Karriereplanung & strategischer Aufbau
📣 Marketing & Social Media Support
🤝 Zugang zu exklusiven Events & starken Partnern

Ich glaube an Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. An Kreativität mit Struktur. Und an Erfolg, der gemeinsam entsteht.

Egal ob Newcomer oder etablierter Künstlerin – wenn du bereit bist, dein Potenzial voll auszuschöpfen, dann freue ich mich darauf, dich kennenzulernen.

Backstage Event Management – Deine Bühne. Dein Moment. Unser gemeinsamer Weg.

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

"DAB," a Student Film - BRISTOL - March 15-22

*In the 2 weeks after a riot, a young black man attempts to live a normal life whilst an unjust legal system closes in.*

ACTORS:

**Protagonist's Father**

Lead. Male. 40-55

Quiet, disciplined, and steady. Runs the garage with pride and believes in keeping your head down and working hard. Loves his son deeply but struggles to show it, relying on control and routine instead.

Ethnicity: Black 

**Protagonist's Mother**

Lead. Female. 40-55

Warm, perceptive, and sharp. Helps run the family garage and reads people quickly, especially her son. Humour comes easily, but beneath it is a protective instinct and hard-earned wisdom.

Ethnicity: Black 

APPLY HERE:

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518)

OR CONTACT:
thomas2.baldock@live.uwe.ac.uk

items.title: CASTING CALL!

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL FOR A DEVELOPMENT WORKSHOP OF A NEW PLAY**

**DETAILS:**

Play: ***Ringworm *****(working title)**

Author: **Susie Weidmann**

Dates: **Tuesday 7 – Friday 10 April, 10am – 6pm**

Location: **Southwark, London**

Compensation: **£100 ***

***We are looking for 4 actors, with a playing age of between 18 – 27. All actors must be over the age of 18.***

About the play: Buddy and Ella, recently coupled and flushed by each other’s novelty, decide to move into the adjoining bedroom in George and Sophie’s flat. The paper-thin walls allow conversations, sex, and infidelity to collapse on both relationships. This is a play about constant spillage: of deep-rooted truths, of excess and confused emotion, of physical lust, of relationships as containers which can’t quite satisfy the desires of the two people within.

For this workshop no sexual/intimate moments will be simulated.

Praise for previous work: ‘piercing and uncompromising … [Weidmann’s] script had me trapped, stretched to breaking point, between the twin poles of laughter and tears’ (*President’s Husband’s Reviews*).

**HOW TO AUDITION:**

1. Record a self-tape with:
* An introductory slate stating your name, height, and anything else you’d like to share;
* A contemporary monologue of your choice written after 1980 (it can be one you’ve written); and then
* Tell us a short story: what is one of your biggest regrets? What happened? Why?

Please submit the self-tape as one video (but you can stitch 3 clips together).

2. Fill out the form below linking your self-tape by **23:59, Wednesday 18 March** (but earlier is always appreciated):

# **[https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9](https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9)**

We will email every applicant within 24 hours confirming receipt of their submission, and all applicants will be emailed with the outcome of their audition.

If you have any questions, please feel to get in touch at [honeysroomprod@gmail.com](mailto:honeysroomprod@gmail.com)

Will Shackleton (Producer), Vita Hamilton (Director), Susie Weidmann (Writer)

* We are current students and recent grads so unfortunately so are not able to pay much, but wanted to offer something towards travel/food/token of appreciation.

items.text:
Casting Call — Female Models (NYC, All 5 Boroughs)

MMPRODUCTIONSFILMS is casting female models across all five boroughs of New York City — Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, and Staten Island — for upcoming cinematic visual clips. These projects blend clean framing, emotional presence, and modern NYC energy.

What I’m Looking For
- Women with strong presence and feminine confidence  
- Comfortable on camera and able to take direction  
- Reliable, professional, and aligned with a creative environment  
- Ages 20–35  

What You Receive
- Cinematic footage for your portfolio  
- A complimentary personal photo shoot you can use anytime you need updated photos  
- A professional, respectful, and well‑organized creative space  
- Exposure through final published visuals  

Details
- Locations: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island  
- Dates: Flexible  
- Compensation: TFP collaboration (no monetary pay) + free future photo session  
- Roles: Featured model, supporting model, lifestyle scenes, artistic visuals  

To Submit
Send your name, recent photos, IG/portfolio link, and availability.

items.text:
Casting call for a USC Thesis film Red Fox Run, will have a festival run
Director: Scott Wilson

Logline: Ray Fox thinks he can hide a mob’s drug deal under the cover of a charity golf tournament at his family’s golf course, Red Fox Run—right up until the cops knock on the front door. An original story with heart, humor, and doing bad for the sake of good. Let's bring back the low budget comedy!

Actor Roles we need to fill are as follows;
Deadline is March 15th

We will be filming at the Griffith Park Clubhouse 

Calltime: 9:30 a.m.

Date: March 18th

50 Enthusiastic Golf Course Patrons
2 Mobsters disguised as priests

Please send actor resume and headshots to
Redfoxrunusc@gmail.com or DM Becky Bruner (this would be the best email for any information you may have) this is voluntary, includes IMBD credit as well as crafty and lunch

GENRE: COMEDY COMPENSATION: UNPAID/NONUNION, MEALS PROVIDED, CRAFTY, AND IMDB CREDIT LOOKING FOR GOLF COURSE PATRONS AND MOBSTERS DISGUISED AS PRIESTS'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

We are currently casting for an independent short film shooting in Los Angeles in June. Production will take place over 3 days (TBD on exact dates). 

**Logline:**

Pushed to the brink by his demanding father, a thirteen-year-old spelling prodigy must decide whether to win a high-stakes championship or intentionally sabotage a spelling bee.

**Cast Descriptions:**

VINNY SINGH (Age Range: 11-15)

Lead. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A lanky, awkward spelling prodigy who carries the weight of his father’s immense expectations in his nervous, picking fingers. He is anxious and introverted, but deeply observant.  

VIKRAM SINGH (Age Range 6-9)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $250 Flat

The adorable, oblivious younger brother who is more interested in his Game Boy than the high-stakes drama unfolding around him. He is playful, curious, and sweet.  

AARON (Age Range 11-15)

Supporting. Open Ethnicity. 

Rate: $250 Flat

Calm and self-assured, Aaron is the steady, razor-sharp finalist who stands between Vinny and the championship.

BOBBY SINGH (Age Range: Late 30s-50s)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A weathered, intense patriarch who operates less like a father and more like a ruthless boxing coach. He loves his children, but he loves winning more.  

**Submission Requirements:**
* Headshot
* Resume
* Reel or recent self-tape
* Slate (name, age, height, location)
* Parent/guardian contact (if under 18)
* Availability for June shoot dates in Los Angeles
* 

*Sides will be sent to selected actors after initial submission review.*

Please send all material to: cyuscasting@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

**CASTING CALL – STUDENT COMEDY MINI-SERIES**

Hi! We’re looking to cast **four student actors** as the main ensemble of our upcoming comedy mini-series.

We are **graduating film students at MetFilm School London**, producing a **sitcom-style mini-series** about a struggling amateur band preparing to perform their **first live gig**.

The series centres around **miscommunication**. These musicians desperately want to be heard by the world — but struggle to hear each other.

**Meet the Band**

**ELLIOT – Lead Singer / Songwriter**
*A tortured artist; Elliot is a volatile mix of ego and insecurity.* Convinced he’s destined for greatness, he struggles with patience, collaboration, and attention. Underneath the drama is a sensitive musician desperate to be heard.
**Playing Age:** 20–25

**JEFFERY – Bassist**
Cocky, outgoing, and the life of the party, Jeffery is always chasing the next thrill — girls, nights out, or anything exciting — which often makes him lose focus on the band. He must learn that being part of something bigger means staying focused and taking responsibility.
**Playing Age:** 20–25

**ED (EDWARD) – Drummer**
Shy, lovable, and slightly in his own world, Ed plays music for connection rather than ambition. Honest and naive, he brings warmth to the group, but needs to learn that it’s okay to speak up for more than eight words at a time.
**Playing Age:** 20–25

**MICHELLE – The Unappointed Manager**

Organised, witty, and outspoken, Michelle keeps the band in check. She lives with Elliot and Jeffery and is constantly dealing with their chaotic mistakes. Though she insists she’s only trying to keep things under control, she secretly enjoys managing the band’s dysfunction — and must eventually decide whether to step back or fully embrace the role she’s created for herself.
**Playing Age:** 20–25

**Production Details**

• **Location:** London
• **Shoot:** 9–10 days in mid-April
• **Dates:** Within **14–26 April** (exact dates TBC)
• **Compensation:** Unpaid student production
• **Travel expenses covered**
• **Catering provided on set**

Throughout the series, the band faces a series of obstacles while trying to **book their first gig and finally perform live**, navigating ego clashes, poor communication, and the chaos of working together.

We’re looking for **energetic performers with strong comedic instincts** who enjoy collaborative student productions.

**For enquiries please contact:** srtmghfilm@gmail.com | +44 7392 408865 🎬

Sign up here to apply: [[[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)

# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

Full Programme and Ticket Link:

items.summary:
# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

Full Programme and Ticket Link:

# www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

See you there!!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

items.text:
CASTING – DYSKONT SPOŻYWCZY🏪

POSZUKUJEMY:

👉KOBIETY i MĘŻCZYZNY (55-70 lat) –naturalnych, zadbanych, pełnych ciepła, z siwymi włosami.

👉MĘŻCZYZNY (25-35 lat)–hipstera, ze świetnym poczuciem stylu, autentycznego.

👉KOBIETY (18-25 lat)–z wygodnym, ale modnym stylem, nowoczesnej, obeznanej w mediach.

👉MĘŻCZYZNY lub KOBIETY (30-45 lat)–eleganckich, zadbanych, z klasycznym, biznesowym stylem, którzy są na bieżąco z najnowszymi trendami w branży.

👉MĘŻCZYZNY (20-35 lat)–nerda, zaczytanego w książkach i komiksach, kochającego gry komputerowe.

👉MĘŻCZYZNY (25-40 lat)–silnego, bezpośredniego, typowego "dresa".

👉MĘŻCZYZNY (25-45 lat)–wysportowanego, który samym swoim wyglądem krzyczy, że kocha siłownie i zdrowy life style.

WYMAGANIA:

➡️Doświadczenie aktorskie

➡️Brak aktywnych praw do reklam konkurencji.

HARMONOGRAM:

# **START TYGODNIA NA PLANIE – SPRAWDŹ NAJNOWSZE NABORY! 🎬**

*Kalendarz na ten tydzień jeszcze pusty? Właśnie wpadły świeże nabory z Warszawy, Gdyni i Wrocławia. Szybka akcja, konkretne role i szansa na wejście na plan jeszcze w tym tygodniu.* *Poniżej znajduje się zestawienie najciekawszych propozycji.*

REKLAMY I SESJE ZDJĘCIOWE
* **Reklama w klimacie lat 80. (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są statyści (kobiety i mężczyźni 20–60 lat).
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112271
* **Sesja zdjęciowa dla muzeum (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są modele (kobiety i mężczyźni 12–45 lat)
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112268
* **Reklama (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są statyści seniorzy w wieku 60–90 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112269
* **Reklama – przechodnie (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 20–60 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112264
## **SERIALE I FILMY**
* **Serial „Na Ratunek 112” (Wrocław):** Poszukiwani są aktorzy do udziału w nagraniach.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112263
* **Serial „Ukryta Prawda” (Warszawa):** Poszukiwana jest 
aktorka w wieku 35–45 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112272
* **Film fabularny (Gdynia):** Produkcja szuka statystów (mężczyźni 18–35 lat).
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112267

***APLIKUJ BEZ LIMITÓW! ⭐***

*Obecnie dostępna jest opcja korzystania ze wszystkich funkcji premium przez ****30 dni całkowicie za darmo****. To najlepszy moment, aby sprawdzić możliwości serwisu bez żadnych kosztów.*

👉 **Odbierz darmowy miesiąc VIP i wyślij zgłoszenia:** www.easycasting.pl

*[Aktywne linki znajdziesz w udostępnionym poście poniżej]*

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control. 

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
**EMERGENCY CASTING CALL! SHORT FILM LEAD ACTOR WANTED!**

Our previous actor dropped out so we are urgently searching for a lead actor for our upcoming short film, 'Stages'.

'Stages' follows Francis, who goes to therapy to deal with his recent divorce, spiralling backwards through the stages of grief before he is forced to confront the reality of his denial.

**Genre:** drama, psychological

**CASTING Brief details:**
* Adult male, **late 20s - 50s**
* Filming based **Portsmouth **
* **£150** wage or for travel expense coverage (can be stretched to £200 if travel expenses require)

**REHEARSAL DATES** (not necessary to attend but would be ideal):
* **Thursday 12th March**
* **Friday 13th March**

**SHOOT DATES** (unmovable, must attend, **12pm - 10pm**):
* **Monday 16th - Wednesday 18th**
* Another date in April TBC

Please email **rishchakraborty@gmail.com **if interested!!!

**Deadline: **Tuesday 10th March

Email rishchakraborty@gmail.com ASAP if you are interested! Deadline: Tuesday 10th March'

sharedPost.text:
***AUDITION NOTICE***

BEYOND THE SEA (Staged Reading)

Author: Kristen DaSilva
Director: Chris Schuessler
Producer: Michele Partridge

**Audition Date: Wednesday, April 1, 6 PM
**Preparation: Sides will be emailed to selected auditioners
Production Dates: May 28-31, 2026 - Staged Reading
Rehearsals and Show Venue: Peninsula Productions, 14600 North Bluff Road, White Rock
Rehearsals: TBD
Actors are paid an honourarium and get free parking

Play Summary:
A staged reading of a bittersweet Canadian rom-com. Two 40-something strangers meet on a
small town pier - Theo waits for an overdue date who may or may not show up, while Gwen works
the ticket booth for a Ghost Tour boat ride. Theo frets over everything from his outfit choice to text
compositions, while Gwen calms him with dating advice and embarrassing stories of her own. As
the two slowly open up to each other, the play explores the strange tenderness of starting over
while struggling with loss and grief. Talk back after each show.

Characters:

THEO (40s) - has been cast

GWEN (40s) - is the emotional heart of Beyond the Sea by Kristen Da Silva. A widowed woman
living in a small seaside town, s h e is strong, capable, and quietly resilient, having built a life shaped
by love and sudden loss. Beneath her practical exterior lies deep grief, vulnerability, and a longing
she scarcely allows herself to acknowledge. The actor must be able to balance toughness with
tenderness, conveying both sharp wit and raw emotional honesty. Strong grounding in naturalistic
performance is essential, with the ability to navigate humour, silence, and heartbreak with
authenticity.

**To secure an audition time, please email your headshot and resume to:
Michele Partridge  - michele@peninsulaproductions.org by Sunday, March 29, 2026

We look forward to hearing from you!

www.peninsulaproductions.org

 #auditions #actors #stagedreading #whiterockbc #performers #supportlocal #southsurreybc #community #theatre #PeninsulaProductions

Short Film: Duet

We are currently casting the role of Young Elle for the upcoming short film Duet.

Role

Young Elle

Female

Approximately ages 5 to 7

Young Elle appears in a single memory sequence that reflects the warmth of her relationship with her father before the events of the film unfold. We are looking for a natural and expressive young performer who can bring sincerity and warmth to the role.

Independent short film

Non union

Age and location

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL FOR A DEVELOPMENT WORKSHOP OF A NEW PLAY**

**DETAILS:**

Play: ***Ringworm *****(working title)**

Author: **Susie Weidmann**

Dates: **Tuesday 7 – Friday 10 April, 10am – 6pm**

Location: **Southwark, London**

Compensation: **£100 ***

***We are looking for 4 actors, with a playing age of between 18 – 27. All actors must be over the age of 18.***

About the play: Buddy and Ella, recently coupled and flushed by each other’s novelty, decide to move into the adjoining bedroom in George and Sophie’s flat. The paper-thin walls allow conversations, sex, and infidelity to collapse on both relationships. This is a play about constant spillage: of deep-rooted truths, of excess and confused emotion, of physical lust, of relationships as containers which can’t quite satisfy the desires of the two people within.

For this workshop no sexual/intimate moments will be simulated.

Praise for previous work: ‘piercing and uncompromising … [Weidmann’s] script had me trapped, stretched to breaking point, between the twin poles of laughter and tears’ (*President’s Husband’s Reviews*).

**HOW TO AUDITION:**

1. Record a self-tape with:
* An introductory slate stating your name, height, and anything else you’d like to share;
* A contemporary monologue of your choice written after 1980 (it can be one you’ve written); and then
* Tell us a short story: what is one of your biggest regrets? What happened? Why?

Please submit the self-tape as one video (but you can stitch 3 clips together).

2. Fill out the form below linking your self-tape by **23:59, Wednesday 18 March** (but earlier is always appreciated):

# **[https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9](https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9)**

We will email every applicant within 24 hours confirming receipt of their submission, and all applicants will be emailed with the outcome of their audition.

If you have any questions, please feel to get in touch at [honeysroomprod@gmail.com](mailto:honeysroomprod@gmail.com)

Will Shackleton (Producer), Vita Hamilton (Director), Susie Weidmann (Writer)

* We are current students and recent grads so unfortunately so are not able to pay much, but wanted to offer something towards travel/food/token of appreciation.

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

"DAB," a Student Film - BRISTOL - March 15-22

*In the 2 weeks after a riot, a young black man attempts to live a normal life whilst an unjust legal system closes in.*

ACTORS:

**Protagonist's Father**

Lead. Male. 40-55

Quiet, disciplined, and steady. Runs the garage with pride and believes in keeping your head down and working hard. Loves his son deeply but struggles to show it, relying on control and routine instead.

Ethnicity: Black 

**Protagonist's Mother**

Lead. Female. 40-55

Warm, perceptive, and sharp. Helps run the family garage and reads people quickly, especially her son. Humour comes easily, but beneath it is a protective instinct and hard-earned wisdom.

Ethnicity: Black 

APPLY HERE:

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518)

OR CONTACT:
thomas2.baldock@live.uwe.ac.uk

items.text:
🔥 PAID DANCE AUDITION – LOS ANGELES 🔥
Seeking female dancers for a professional Rajasthani folk dance production. Performances include cultural festivals, theaters, and touring opportunities.

This is a rare opportunity to learn these unique dance traditions from the only dancer in America trained directly with the Rajasthani communities where these dances originated.

✨ Looking for dancers who:• Have strong stage presence and performance energy• Pick up choreography quickly• Are open to learning traditional Rajasthani dance forms• Backgrounds in Bollywood, bellydance, world dance, or contemporary are a plus

💃 Dance styles include:Kalbelia • Ghoomar • Chari • Terah Taal • Folk fusion

📍 Location: Gypsy Camp Ethnic Arts Center – Los Angeles📅 Audition Date: Tuesday, March 24⏰ Time: 7:00–9:00 PM

📆 Rehearsals: Tuesdays 7:00–9:00 PM beginning April 7 in Los Angeles💰 Paid performances

Directed by Katrina Ji, a U.S.-based artist trained directly with traditional Rajasthani dance communities in India.

📩 To apply:Send a dance reel or short performance clip, plus your name and dance background via DM or email: rajasthanicaravan@gmail.com

✨ Experience the rhythm, power, and beauty of Rajasthan.

#DanceAudition #LADancers #PaidDanceGig #WorldDance #BollywoodDance DanceOpportunity RajasthaniDance

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

items.text:
**[CREW CALL: TRADE & BARTER] – LA/Burbank – Narrative Vertical Series **

I’m producing a 3-episode narrative series titled **"Kandor Kin."** This is a "Live Classroom" project focused on the contrast between industry exploitation and the safety of a self-sustaining creative ecosystem.

**The Project:**
* **Format:** 3 Vertical Episodes (approx. 1 min each)
* **Shoot Time:** 6–7 hour window (One Day)
* **Location:** Basecamp (Burbank)
* **Date:** Late March

**Looking For:**
* **DP / Videographers:** High-impact, narrative-style shooters.
* **Gaffer:** Lighting is the "lead character" here—we need to visually separate the "Cold Industry" from the "Warm Kin" environment.

**The Reality:** This is an unpaid production for our nonprofit arm, but **Kollective Kandor** doesn't believe in "free." We believe in mutual sustainability and circulating resources.

**In exchange for your talent/gear, I am offering:**
1. **LOCATION SPONSORSHIP:** Access/Sponsorship for a restaurant or food truck location for your next project.
2. **ORIGINAL SCORE:** I will provide custom music composition/scoring for your next visual project (under 10 mins).
3. **CASTING:** Access to our curated roster of actors for your future productions.

If you’re tired of the "starving artist" gatekeeping and want to build a healthier ecosystem while getting high-end narrative content for your reel, let’s talk.

**DROP your role + your choice of exchange below, or DM me with your reel/work.**

items.text:
BOXING FITNESS
My name is Rameses. I’m a professional boxer currently in fight camp training in Hollywood at the legendary Wild Card Boxing Club under Hall-of-Fame trainer.
During camp I have a limited number of afternoon training sessions available (12:00pm–3:30pm, Monday–Friday) for anyone interested in learning real boxing technique or incorporating boxing conditioning into their fitness routine.
Boxing is one of the most efficient workouts available and is used by many actors and professionals to build conditioning, coordination, and mental focus.

Who this is for: 
• Beginners 
• Adults & Busy professionals who want an efficient, focused workout
• Women interested in boxing for confidence & self-defense
• Kids and teens 
• Athletes wanting to sharpen skills, speed & coordination

Sessions focus on: 
🥊 Boxing fundamentals
🥊 Mitt work and footwork
🥊 Conditioning and core strength
🥊 Skill development and movement

All levels welcome, including complete beginners.
If you’re interested in training or want more information, feel free to send me a message.

Thanks everyone.

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect

Example: https://vimeo.com/1119845100/ea1fd86ea4?fl=ip&fe=ec

 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect

Example: https://vimeo.com/1119845100/ea1fd86ea4?fl=ip&fe=ec

 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

items.text:
Hello,

I’m a young filmmaker from Bristol currently making a short film called *Communities and Coal*. The film is about the women who held their communities together during the 1980s miners’ strikes. Inspired by the photography of Brenda Prince, it follows Iris, a housewife from South Wales, and her journey to becoming an active part of her community.

We are currently looking for actors who are available **from the 22nd to the 24th of March** to film in an Airbnb in Bristol, and **one additional day on the 27th of March** in a community centre in Ashton, Bristol.

The role of Brenda will also require **one day of filming in South Wales**, either on the **26th or the 28th of March**. This date will be confirmed as soon as possible.

If you are interested, please send me an email at:
**[Jonnymoralee@outlook.com](mailto:Jonnymoralee@outlook.com)**

Or contact me on Instagram:
**@Jonnymoralee21**

Thank you.

items.text:
We are having so much fun in THE GREAT BRITISH BAKE OFF MUSICAL rehearsals!!

Yesterday we staged Slap It Like That - how many jokes can there be about dough!!!

We are still looking for a male performer for the role of BEN (bari/tenor 30s/40s) so if you are interested in this wonderful role and can join us for the show then please email or PM me - harri@brooksidetheatre.com 

Show w/c 4th May 2026

Venue: Brookside Theatre, Romford 

Rehearsals: Monday & Wednesday evenings and Sunday daytimes by a schedule (plus Thursday evenings nearer show week in April)

**This is a charity production offering a split of opening night ticket sales to the cast**

items.text:
Film Title: Chinese Whispers
We are casting for an upcoming university short film project filming in Newcastle upon Tyne, specifically in the Jesmond Area. 

Due to University regulations, this will be an unpaid student production. The shooting will take place over 3-5 days in late March. 

Things included: 

Travel expenses 

Food provided on shoot days 

Footage shared with actor’s upon request.

 

Movie log line: Working behind the counter of a sketchy Newcastle off licence, Lola pieces together the fractured history of two alcoholic regulars, only to discover their bitter separation was built on a simple miscommunication that might still be undone. 

Roles we are searching for: 

Lola (Shopkeeper): 

Playing Age: 18 - 30 

Character: Sassy, confident, and emotionally intelligent. Lola knows everything about everyone and is always observing. She is inquisitive and sharp, and her goal in the short film is to reconcile a broken-up couple throughout the film 

 

Maggie: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Naïve, vulnerable, and an “oversharer”. Maggie is stubborn and in denial about her alcoholism and past relationship. She often claims she “gets drinks for her nerves” when at the shop. 

 

John: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Rambunctious and large in personality. John is open about being an alcoholic, slightly sluggish, and talks about Maggie often at the shop. His drinking leads him to reveal personal information to Lola. 

 

Please register your interest by sending an inquiry email to castingbrookehope@gmail.com. Further information regarding casting/auditions will be provided upon your registration of interest.

BASED IN: FURTHER DETAILS:'

items.text:
Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilmprojekt -- Proof of Concept Phase --Leidenschaftliche Zusammenarbeit -- Kassel

Hallo ihr Lieben! Ich arbeite derzeit an einem Kurzfilmprojekt in Kassel und suche begeisterte Schauspieler sowie einen 1st AC (Kameraassistenten/Focus puller), die mit uns zusammenarbeiten möchten. [Weitere freiwillige Crewmitglieder (sowie Maske, Ton, Helfer, etc.) sind willkommen.] Wir befinden uns aktuell in der Proof-of-Concept-Phase, in der wir eine Szene drehen werden, um anschließend eine Finanzierung für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.

**Über das Projekt:**
* Titel: ALL IN
* Genre: Psychologischer Thriller
* Dauer: Circa 40
* Dauer Proof-of-Concept: 5 min
* Sprache: Englisch (Setsprache noch offen)
* Synopsis: Die Geschichte dreht sich um ein Pokerspiel, das als Plattform für vier Hauptfiguren dient, die sich mit ihrer Vergangenheit auseinandersetzen. Diese werden durch intensive Rückblenden dargestellt.

**Unser Vorgehen:**
* Wir drehen zunächst eine Testszene als Proof of Concept.
* Dieses Material wird genutzt, um ein Budget für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.
* Table Read ist für April geplant und wird auf Englisch durchgeführt werden.
* Der Dreh des Proof-of-Concepts wird ebenfalls auf Englisch stattfinden.

**Wichtige Hinweise:**
* Schauspieler für Hauptrollen sollten bereit sein, sich Wissen über psychische Erkrankungen und deren charakteristische Merkmale anzueignen, um die Authentizität der Darstellungen zu erhöhen.
* Erforderliche Fähigkeiten: Darstellungen, die komplexe Emotionen wie Trauma, Konfrontation und Verzweiflung authentisch vermitteln; mit Fokus auf subtilem und realistischem Schauspiel.

**Gesuchte Rollen:** Wir sind bereits ein kleines Team, möchten aber trotzdem alle gesuchten Rollen hier noch einmal auflisten.

**Hauptfiguren:**
* Chris (25-40 Jahre) -- zurückgezogen, emotional aufgeladen, trägt eine schwere Last mit sich. Subtil, nie übertrieben.
* K (32-40 Jahre) -- instabil, verzweifelt, zwischen Kontrolle und Zusammenbruch.
> *John -- BESETZT -- dominant, arrogant, aber mit einer tiefen Verletzlichkeit darunter. Muss beides gleichzeitig spielen können.*
> *Trevor -- BESETZT -- kühl, unlesbar, beobachtend. Wenig Text, maximale Wirkung.*

**Nebenrollen:**
* Charlotte (15-17 Jahre) -- warm, fürsorglich, die emotionale Mitte des Films. Ihre Szene ist klein aber entscheidend. -- EVTL. BESETZT --
* Chris, jung (13-14 Jahre) -- wütend, verletzt, noch nicht in der Lage dies auszudrücken. Muss Stille spielen können.
* Vater (Stimme, kein Bild -- vorerst keine Erscheinung vor der Kamera notwendig) -- autoritär, kalt.
* Mutter (Details folgen)

**Weitere Informationen:**
* Essen wird zur Verfügung gestellt (mit veganer Option).
* Drehorte sind im Raum Kassel.
* Für die Proof-of-Concept-Phase kann leider keine Gage gezahlt werden. Anfahrtskosten können jedoch nach Absprache gegebenenfalls übernommen werden.
* Für die vollständige Produktion sind wir aktiv dabei, ein Budget zu sichern. Je nach gesicherter Finanzierung wird eine Gage für alle Darsteller angestrebt.
* Alle Beteiligten erhalten vollständige Credits sowie eine Kopie des fertigen Films.

Wenn du Interesse an einer kreativen, kollaborativen Zusammenarbeit und Lust darauf hast , deine Leidenschaft in einem atmosphärischen Projekt auszuleben, melde dich gerne bei mir! Teile den Beitrag gerne, wenn du jemanden kennst, der interessiert sein könnte. Ich freue mich darauf, von euch zu hören! mail: [maxmeyer414@gmail.com](mailto:maxmeyer414@gmail.com)

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

items.text:
I’m casting for an emotional coming-of-age drama titled Remember the Light. The film explores grief, friendship, bullying, and finding hope during difficult moments. We are looking for teens and adults to fill both speaking roles and background roles.

This is a non-paid, volunteer project. This is a great opportunity for students, first-time actors, and anyone interested in gaining film experience. Cast members will receive screen credit, footage for their reels, and snacks will be provided on set.

Location: Karlstad, MN & Grand Forks, ND area

MAIN ROLES

Lizzy (13) – Quiet, observant, and emotionally deep. She struggles with grief and bullying at school but slowly begins to open up and find support in the people around her.

Zach (14–16) – Kind, patient, and supportive. Lizzy’s brother.

Amber (14) – Lizzy’s close friend who is seriously ill. Gentle, caring, and emotionally strong despite her condition. Her friendship with Lizzy is one of the most important parts of the story.

SUPPORTING ROLES

Sarah (15) – Confident and outspoken. A student who isn’t afraid to speak up and has a strong personality among the friend group. One of the main bullies.

Kai (14–16) – Observant and calm. Often tries to keep the peace among friends.

Mother (35–50) – Lizzy’s caring but worried mom who wants to help her but sometimes struggles to understand what Lizzy is going through.

Father (Mid 30s-40) - Lizzy and Zach’s deceased father. Appears briefly in a flashback scene from Lizzy’s early childhood. Gentle, caring, and protective. Even after his death, his voice guides Lizzy toward the light during her darkest moments

Mr. Jennings (Mid-50s) – A school staff member who interacts with students during important moments in the story. Calm, serious, and authoritative but not unkind.

Ms. Rivera (25–50) – A teacher who notices Lizzy struggling and tries to support her.

Principal (35–60) – School administrator involved in important school situations.

OTHER SPEAKING ROLES

Bully 1 (14–16) – Instigator of the cafeteria bullying scene.

Bully 2 (14–16) – Helps encourage the crowd during the chanting.

Student 1 (13–16)

Student 2 (13–16)

Student 3 (13–16)

Student 4 (13–16)

Classmate 1 (13–16)

Classmate 2 (13–16)

Hallway Student (13–16)

Teacher (25–60)

Officer 1 (25–60)

Officer 2 (25–60)

Manager (25–60)

Bus Driver (25–60)

FLASHBACK ROLES

Younger Lizzy (7–9) – Appears in childhood memory scenes.

Younger Amber (7–9) – Appears in childhood flashback scenes.

BACKGROUND / EXTRA ROLES

Lunchroom Students – crowded cafeteria scene.

Chanting Students – students who join the “lover girl” chant.

Hallway Students – students walking between classes.

Bus Riders – students arriving and leaving school.

Sidewalk Pedestrians – background characters walking through neighborhood scenes.

No acting experience is required for background roles.

TO AUDITION

Please send:
• Name and age  
• Recent photo  
• Any acting experience (optional)  
• The role you are interested in  

Students, first-time actors, and anyone interested in being part of a meaningful film are encouraged to audition.

topComments.text: Wish I could audition 😔, I live in Australia
I am a 14 years old boy and am interested in zachs role , and I live in Zambia 🇿🇲

Undskyld konditor, din hemmelighed : Jeg kan ikke stoppe med at bage sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem op! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser får du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

FOR AT FORTSÆTTE MED MINE OPSKRIFTER, "DEL"

topComments.text:
Genre : comedy, drama 

Based in : UK 

Recorded in : the Wirral 
Filming locations : Wirral 
Filming date : April/may - ongoing 

Premise : an unlikely group of friends from a multitude of backgrounds including highschool drop outs, educated college students, and even a low time drug dealer. Set between 2000s and 2015, this series shows friendship is messy and chaotic, pulling no punches, this group is unpredictable and at times emotional, but always "real". 

Tone : nostalgic, friendly, comedic, 

Characters : 

.Izzy pastel - smart student with a down to earth personality, attends college, always having banter with the lads and able to keep up, mental sparring is her Forte. [ Free ] 

.Jamie "ash" carter - rough around the edges but lovable, college drop out ( kick out), enjoys art, joking, and smoking. 
[ Taken ] 

.Ryan carter - older brother to Jamie. Shy, calm, and reserved, doesn't talk much but when he does it's comedy gold. 
[ Free ] 

.Eddie sharp - close friends with the carter brothers, they all went to school together, consistently unemployed, low time drug dealer. 
[ Taken ] 

.Callum nightly - loves being the centre of attention, close friendship with Eddie due to consist drug use. Can sometimes be erratic. 
[ Free ] 

. Sophie frost - blonde, chaotic, extreme drug user, loves raves festivals and flirting, the group help her slow down from her fast paced lifestyle. 
[ Free ] 

.Ethan shroud - althletic rugby player, trains week days, parties weekends, knows his limits and dosnt take things too far, slightly better off than the rest of the group but always shares the wealth. 
[ Free ] 

Simon Skinner "psycho si" - local bully, always taking stuff from the group, hates everyone, hated by everyone. Loose cannon, can switch mood in an instance.
[ Free ] 

EXTRAS : 
all extra positions available 

Production crew : 
Director
Sound engineer
Editer 

Pay and travel : possible compensation | travel covered | 

Credits : full credits with legal or chosen name 

Character wardrobes : 

.Jamie "ash" carter - button up shirts, patterns, jeans, denim jackets, caps,

.Ryan carter - hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Izzy pastel - jumpers, skirts, jeans, hoodies, 

.Eddie sharp - tracksuits, beanies, trainers, 

.Ethan shroud - jumpers, sports jerseys, jeans, boots,

.Callum nightly - windbreakers, tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Evie Owens - shirts, jeans, leopard prints 

.Simon Skinner "psycho Simon" - tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, caps, Burberry 

NOTE : MUST BE COMFORTABLE SMOKING EFFECT CIGARETTES
Hi

Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!

 Termin: 13.03
 Lokalizacja: Warszawa – Śródmieście
 Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.
(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

 O projekcie:
Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

 Stawka: 100 zł netto
Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

 Ubiór:
Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.
 Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

 Zgłoszenia:
Wyślij email na: o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

# ‼️🫧URGENT CASTING CALL🫧‼️

We are in need of 2 people to star in our short film ‘Bubbles’🫧

We are looking for someone to play the roles of Caitlyn and George - details on the poster above🫧🤍

If you are interested, please get in touch via direct message or email 16033827@students.southwales.ac.uk

More information can be provided if needed🙂🫧

message.text:
Johnny Vegas reveals the strangest thing he’s ever done…

Standing alone in the woods tweeting like an owl hoping one would fly down and land on him.

Yes, really.

🎥  This episode is co-produced with Tees Valley International Film Festival, recorded live during the festival weekend.

Watch the full interview with Johnny Vegas via Link in comments!

#JohnnyVegas #Comedy #BritishComedy #FunnyStory #PodcastClips #IndieFilm #Filmmaking #UKComedy #SoundAndScope
