items.text:
UPDATED: NOW OFFERING RELOCATION FOR THE RIGHT CANDIDATE

 

If you know of an Executive/ Personal Assistant that has worked for UHNW or A-list celebs long term and is looking for work in NYC, please send them my way! This is 100% a lifestyle position and the people who will be considered will have had solid experience over the past 5-10 years (minimum) with ONE to TWO heavily traveled, fast paced principals full time. If you have had more than three positions over the past 10 years you will not be considered, proven longevity in a fast paced environment is what this client is looking for. 

Feel free to share with qualified candidates and please do not DM me on FB. Send resumes to Bridget@slggroupstaffing.com or call me at (347)405-1665

Thank you! 

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / PERSONAL ASSISTANT (ON-CALL HANDLER)-NEW YORK, NY (Relocation offered for the right candidate)

This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references

items.text:
Hot take: commercials are not the enemy. They are creative, fast, and one of the best places to learn how to act on camera and get paid while doing it 😉 

If commercials feel intimidating, our A–Z Commercial Acting Class helps you understand what casting is looking for and how to bring your personality into the room!

Learn more about the A–Z Commercial Acting Class here: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#a-z-commercial-acting

#ActorTraining #CommercialAuditions #ActingClass

Learn more about the A–Z Commercial Acting Class here: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#a-z-commercial-acting

Suche immer noch eine Sängerin (gerne auch Amateurin) für meine Songs. Ich biete die Stücke, die Musik und die Aufnahme. Um sich regelmäßig treffen zu können, wäre eine räumliche Nähe zu Großhansdorf schon gut. Wäre schön von dir zu hören. 
Wäre hilfreich, wenn ihr die Anzeige teilen würdet. LG Werner

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

items.text:
Witam,

Nazywam się Roman Buzov, mam 20 lat. Pochodzę z Ukrainy, 4 lata mieszkam w Polsce (aktualnie Poznań), mogę dojechać w dowolne miejsce.

Mam doświadczenie na planie – występowałem w serialu „Gliniarze” oraz jako statysta w kilku produkcjach (piłkarz, kibic, klient restauracji, imprezowicz, widz teatralny).

Od 5 lat aktywnie uprawiam sport (siłownia, kalistenika, wcześniej boks, pływanie, piłka nożna i walki filipińskie). Jestem osobą sprawną fizycznie i lubię wyzwania.

Mogę grać role epizodyczne z tekstem lub bez. Naturalne dla mnie typy ról: bandyta, biznesmen, trener, mafia. Zmiana fryzury lub zarostu nie stanowi problemu.

Mówię w językach: polski, angielski, rosyjski, ukraiński.
Posiadam samochód.

Parametry:
171 cm wzrostu, 70 kg
klatka 105 cm / pas 85 cm
rozmiar ubrań S/M
buty 40–41

W mediach społecznościowych publikuję treści o rozwoju i motywacji – łącznie ok. 1.5 mln wyświetleń.

W załączniku przesyłam aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki.

Z poważaniem,
Roman Buzov

items.title: Witam,

items.text:
**Templariusze  poszukiwani !**

** **

**INTRO mini serialu pod 1940r.**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje mężczyzny w **wieku 30 – 50 lat **o obwodzie **w klatce 95 – 105** z brodą do roli w 2 scenach rycerza templariuszy. Postać będzie nosić tunikę z czerwonym krzyżem, odkryty hełm z widoczną twarzą i nosalem, pas, włócznie.  Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej.**    **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

**Gesucht werden:**
* Mama
* Papa
* Junge (8–13 Jahre)
* Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

**Wichtige Voraussetzungen:**
* Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
* Keine Piercings

**Drehort: Südbayern und Innsbruck**

**Drehtage: **
* **2 Drehtage (Outdoor)**
* **Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag**
* **Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang**
* **Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 17.03.-25.03.**

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy Tekieli

topComments.text: Eine wichtige Angaben des Honorares fehlt noch!!

items.text:
**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

# **WE HAVE CASTED ALL ROLES!!**

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

items.text:
NOW ACCEPTING ALL SIGN UPS!
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 

Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: JOIN OUR ACTING HOBBY PODCAST

When a group of actors sit around a table and use their spoken words to portray characters all going on an adventure together, that's called a tabletop roleplaying game (TTRPG). Example famous TTRPG podcasts: Critical Role, The Adventure Zone, NADDPod, Dungeons and Daddies, Dimension 20. Our gaming group plays a variety of tabletop roleplaying games and publishes the audio as a podcast. We react as our character to the scenario presented by the game master. We respond to challenges, overcome obstacles, make jokes and laugh with our fellow acting friends. Would you enjoy acting in-character for a podcast audience? Join us.

# System played:

We get to learn and play a different tabletop roleplaying game (ttrpg) system each session. There’s no financial burden to you. The systems are either free to everyone or we were sent a promotional copy from its creator. Because we record and publish the audio of our game sessions, indie game developers get an actual play episode to show their game being actually played. Anyone can listen to and hear an example of their system in action. Actual play episodes help more people see how a game is played, and maybe try it themselves. It's why creators send us their rules for free. That's why we’re a podcast. There isn't any money involved. We just do this for fun.

# When we play:

Weekends. Flexible times. Both European and American time zones. Joining us doesn't commit you to every weekend. Instead, we pick games we want to try and sign up for those calendar spots. Members can see who's playing and what ttrpg and pick which sessions they sign up for.

# How long we play / what it’s like:

Our members sit at their microphones for four hours talking their way through an adventure using their words and laughter to entertain each other. The GM says out loud how far away targets are instead of us all looking at combat maps on a screen. Each player sketches or constructs their own battle map on their desk in front of them, using their own minis. So you'll be able to use your minis every game you play. The recordings are high quality, and we air the audio as a podcast. Don’t worry, we don’t publish our names or faces.

# Oneshot or campaign:

Both. Like a oneshot, each individual episode opens with a beginning to its plot, and the exploration of its story ends after four hours. Like a traditional campaign, we repeatedly meet familiar non player characters (NPCs), facing challenges and experiencing long term character growth. Our members make one character for the yearlong campaign and adapt our same character to each ttrpg rule system. The characters are roleplayed so they can’t tell their players are rolling different dice each week. For them, it’s one continuous campaign. Characters are low power level in January, grow to epic max fighting strength by December, then retire.

# Game Mastering (GMing):

We rotate so that everyone is invited to be a player and a game master if they want. The GM gets to pick which ttrpg we play that weekend. If you find a fun ttrpg you want to try, you can sign up as the GM and be confident that there will be players excited to play with you. If you prefer to be a player every time that’s cool, too. Our members don't have to GM ever if they want a break from it. Getting to pick how often you GM really helps relieve burnout. GM as often as makes you happy.

# You can vibe check past games:

We're on itunes, spotify, youtube, and all the podcast apps. Our cast rotates. Skip around and listen to snippets from a few episodes to see which of our members you want to play with first. The episodes aren't all great, but we have fun together. This isn't a job. It's a hobby, a way to relax and laugh meeting new people who slowly over time become lifelong friends. It's okay to miss games; you aren’t expected to be present for every session. The opt-in format naturally minimizes table trouble because you can see who’s signed up to GM and play in a game before you join it, and can pick dates that have people you’re looking forward to playing with.

# Joining:

To join, email us at Firebreathing Kittens Podcast at gmail dot com telling us about your equipment. To make sure everyone’s voice sounds good, we use microphones that capture 24 bit audio. Don’t worry if you’re not sure what 24 bit audio means. Our equipment guide (Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com) explains what all the microphone words mean and lists affordable options, including mics under fifty bucks. We’ll help show you how to get set up so you can focus on playing. Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com also answers frequently asked questions about our format. Beginners welcome. Minimum age 21 years old. No experience necessary. We will guide you through character creation and train you how to record great audio.

CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT FILM
2 lead roles available and extras wanted!!

Unpaid roles, Manchester based.

Self tapes wanted, contact elporter222@gmail.com if you’re interested and want to know more!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CAHL CLEM ............... Playing age: 14-18 (Over 18s only) Streetwear/2000s fashion sense. Middle class: Upper class accent, well spoken. Observant and introspective, navigating early independence with curiosity. Carries a subtle E intensity that draws people in. @Measuresshort'

May be an image of skateboard and text that says 'CASTING CALL LEO Playing age: 16-19 (Over 18s only) Skater/2000s 2000s fashion sense. Upper class but portrays himself as lower class. Outgoing, confident and sociable. Thrives on connection and enjoys making others feel included. FREE SKATEBOARD INCLUDED'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SUNOPSIS Set over a single afternoon in a skatepark, the film follows 16yr old Clem as she reconnects with old friend Leo, who offers to teach her how to skate. He refills her cup between attempts, starting as a sinister favour. As Clem continues, intoxi intoxication begins to compromise her balance and judgement, increasing the risk of each attempt. Leo's encouragement shifts into control as he recognises her growing instability. In the exposed park, Clem's deterioration becomes visible to others, raising questions of responsibility and transforming what began as a carefree reunion into a situation marked by vulnerability. @Measuresshort'

items.text:
🎭 **CASTING CALL – Professor Sylas *London Based Only***

Due to personal circumstances, we are **recasting the role of Professor Sylas** in our original jukebox musical **“A Place Not Mine.”**

The story takes place at **Novaterra University**, a magical academy where students struggle to discover who they truly are. Professor Sylas is one of the university’s strict and respected teachers, challenging students to prove their power and their place at the school.

📍 **Performances:**
5th & 6th July
Drayton Arms Theatre – London

🎭 **Rehearsals:**
Once per week
• One online rehearsal / One in-person rehearsal at **Middlesex University**

📩 **To apply, send to:**
**emilvasilev296@gmail.com**

Please include:
• Headshot, CV, Singing video (Disney or musical theatre song), Acting reel (if available)
• **Phone number**

Selected actors will be contacted directly.

⏳ **Casting is open until the role is filled.**

💼 **Compensation:**
This is an **independent production currently in development**, therefore participation is unpaid at this stage. We are **in discussions for funding**, and if funding is secured the project will become **paid.**

**We are waiting for you! **

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL PROFESSOR SYLAS LONDON-BASED -BASED MALE ACTOR (AGES 27-35) 5TH & σΤΗ JULY DRAYTON ARMS THEATRE ROLE ·INTELLIGENT, AUTHORITATIVE, DEMANDS RESPECT FROM MAGICAL STUDENTS CONTROLS ROLS AND CHALLENGES THE STU STUDENTS REQUIREMENTS •STRONG ACTING ABILITY •SINGING ABILITY MUSICAL THEATRE EXPERIENCE A PLUS REHEARSALS CURRENTLY HELD ONCE PER WEEK: .1ONLINE PERSON IN MIDDLESEX UNIVERSITY TO APPLY: EMAIL HEADSHOT CV SINGING VIDEO PHONE NUMBER TO: emilvasilev296@gmail.com gmail.com emilvasilev (Disney song or musical theatre repertoire encouraged)'

So you want to be an actor! 🎬 Amazing! The next step is learning how the industry actually works and getting comfortable on camera. Our A–Z Commercial Acting Class helps you build real skills, understand what casting looks for, and start showing up with confidence 🎥✨

There’s still time to join Winscombe Youth Theatre’s production of Disney’s Beauty and the Beast JR 🌹

If you’re in Year 3–Year 12, why not come along to a taster session this Saturday at Churchill Academy and see what it’s all about?
No pressure, just fun, creativity, and lots of magic ✨🎭

📧 Email stagepost@hotmail.co.uk
 to sign up today!

#acting #performance #singing #dancing #creativity

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

"DAB," a Student Film - BRISTOL - March 15-22

*In the 2 weeks after a riot, a young black man attempts to live a normal life whilst an unjust legal system closes in.*

ACTORS:

**Protagonist's Father**

Lead. Male. 40-55

Quiet, disciplined, and steady. Runs the garage with pride and believes in keeping your head down and working hard. Loves his son deeply but struggles to show it, relying on control and routine instead.

Ethnicity: Black 

**Protagonist's Mother**

Lead. Female. 40-55

Warm, perceptive, and sharp. Helps run the family garage and reads people quickly, especially her son. Humour comes easily, but beneath it is a protective instinct and hard-earned wisdom.

Ethnicity: Black 

APPLY HERE:

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518)

OR CONTACT:
thomas2.baldock@live.uwe.ac.uk

Experience an unforgettable evening where Jazz meets Gospel at the live album launch of the incredible Deborah McKay 🎶✨

Join us at BAT Centre for a powerful night of soulful music, inspiration, and celebration as Deborah brings her new sound to the stage.

📅 22 March 2026
🚪 Doors open at 5PM
🎟 Tickets: R100 – R300 | VIP: R400
📍 Venue: BAT Centre

Secure your seat now via Quicket.

Come ready for a night of spirit, soul, and sound you won’t forget. 🎤🔥

#DeborahMcKay #JazzMeetsGospel #LiveAlbumLaunch #BATCentre #DurbanEvents #livemusicdurban

sharedPost.text:
I'm looking for new influences.

I already have a new film in mind: "Maybe It's Love, Maybe Not."

I'm an independent film director and I make small films without money, which I send to festivals around the world, and I win my awards.

Here's my IMDb page:

www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/

I don't know what I'm expecting to find here; maybe it's your work you want to bring in, something I've never considered. Surprise me with your inspiration.

I do have my team for camera, editing, and music.

What are you doing? Get in touch, and we'll find a way to collaborate.

Write to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de

Uncover Talent is looking for experienced clarinet / piano / double bass musicians for an upcoming PAID TV commercial.

Style: Jazz Musicians

• Black Men
• Ages 40 - 60
• Experience in double bass

items.text:
🚨🚨🚨CASTING CALL – URGENT ROLES NEEDED!🚨🚨🚨

We are casting a few last-minute roles for the upcoming hip-hop musical feature film "Worth It All." This project is high-energy, passion-driven, and will be filmed in and around Gary, Indiana.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must be available for ALL rehearsals and shooting dates.

• First two rehearsals will be on Zoom for your convenience.

• Once lines are memorized, rehearsals will be held on-site (Gary area).

• We'll be shooting the official trailer (3 scenes) soon after.

PLEASE DO NOT WASTE OUR TIME.

If you cannot commit to:

• Zoom rehearsals,
• In-person rehearsals,
• And filming dates,

do not apply.

We’re looking for real dedication. If you’ve got the talent, passion, and availability, we’d love to see what you bring to the table.

To submit:

Text : Movie to (219) 200-4322

Let’s make something powerful together.
#WorthItAllTheMovie #CastingCall #GaryIndianaFilm #HipHopMusical #NowCasting

Roles below👇🏽👇🏽👇🏽

items.text:
Edge of the Lot- Tv Pilot
📣Casting Call📣

Looking for actors who can work local to Mariposa, California in beginning of April 
Los Angeles background in mid April

Small town coming of age comedy tv show 
Non union independent Tv Pilot 

Feel free to email eotlcasting2026@gmail.com with any questions you may have!

Looking forward to your submissions! 

forms.gle/CUVmQzKEzvrpggQz8

Background: forms.gle/zaKHk63ueGSTikQ57

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Edge of the Lot An independent coming- coming-of-age nindependent.coming-or-agecomedP age comedy Pilot CASTING CALL An Orion Dreams Production'

May be an image of text that says 'Edge of the Lot An independent coming-of-ag comedy Pilot Seeking non union crew members Logline Desperate to escape their loser legacy and get into UCLA, awkward junior Sam and his unhinged best friend Carl set out to write the ultimate college essay only to accidentally create a wild, scandalous book exposing the chaotic, ridiculous year Mayfield High will never forget. An Orion Dreams Production'

May be an image of text that says 'BACKGROUND CALL ப்க Edge of the Lot An independent coming-of-age coming- comedy pilot Seeking non union Background Shoot dates: April 6-7 & April 17-19 2026 Location: Los Angeles & Mariposa, California HIGH SCHOOL STUDENT TYPES *18+ to play 16-18 years old* Cheerleaders Jocks Athletes Theater kids Party Goers Pool Party guests Nerds Skater Kids How to Submit Submit to the form linked in our bio An Orion Dreams Production'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Edge of the Lot An independent coming-of-age coming Comedy Pilot Seeking non union Day Player English Teacher 6ИИAABИиииRиx (Any ethnicity, 35-60 years old) *Must be able to work local to Mariposa,CA English teacher at Mayfield High, writing mentor to protagonist, Sam Baker Shoot Dates: April 6-7 Location: Mariposa How to Submit Submit to the form linked in our bio An Orion Dreams Production'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Edge of the Lot An independent coming coming-of-ag Comedy Pilot Seeking non union Day Player Trevor (Male, 18+ to play 17-18) Popular senior at Mayfield high, who reveals devastating news to a principle character Shoot Dates: April 17-19 Location: Los Angeles, CA How to Submit Submit to the form linked in our bio An Orion Dreams Production'

topComments.text: What are you looking for in background in Los Angeles? Also, location area please.... LA is pretty large...lol
Mariposa... interesting...  not required to use union casts there...
